entry.title: How to set wallpaper on i3 WM

link.title: How to set wallpaper on i3 WM

entry.summary: 1 - Let’s install nitrogen Use apt for debian based distros sudo dnf install nitrogen 2 - Open nitrogen and set wallpaper This is really straightforward so no tutorial for this 3 - Let’s make a backup of our original i3 WM config cp ~/.config/i3/config ~/.config/i3/config.ori 4 - Edit i3 WM config I gonna use NVIM to edit the config, you can use whatever editor you want nvim ~/.confi...

entry.title: How to change default terminal of i3 WM

link.title: How to change default terminal of i3 WM

entry.summary: 1 - First let’s make a backup of our original i3 WM config cp ~/.config/i3/config ~/.config/i3/config.ori 2 - Edit i3 WM config I gonna use NVIM to edit the config, you can use whatever editor you want nvim ~/.config/i3/config 3 - Inside of config file Now we’re gonna change this line (I’m alacritty user so I’m gonna change it to alacritty) bindsym $mod+Return exec alacritty 4 - Save...

entry.title: How to fix battery percentage on i3 status

link.title: How to fix battery percentage on i3 status

entry.summary: 1 - First let’s make a backup of our original i3 status config cp /etc/i3status.conf ~/.config/i3/i3status.conf 2 - Edit i3status.conf I gonna use NVIM to edit the config, you can use whatever editor you want sudo nvim /etc/i3status.conf 3 - Inside of config file We gonna add this code battery all { ... last_full_capacity = true } 4 - Save the changes and restart i3 Super +...

entry.title: How to change battery percentage to integer on i3 status

link.title: How to change battery percentage to integer on i3 status

entry.summary: 1 - First let’s make a backup of our original i3 status config cp /etc/i3status.conf ~/.config/i3/i3status.conf 2 - Edit i3status.conf I gonna use NVIM to edit the config, you can use whatever editor you want sudo nvim /etc/i3status.conf 3 - Inside of config file We gonna add this code battery all { ... integer_battery_capacity = true } 4 - Save the changes and restart i3 S...

entry.title: How to add cpu temperature on i3 status

link.title: How to add cpu temperature on i3 status

entry.summary: 1 - First let’s make a backup of our original i3 status config cp /etc/i3status.conf ~/.config/i3/i3status.conf 2 - Edit i3status.conf I gonna use NVIM to edit the config, you can use whatever editor you want sudo nvim /etc/i3status.conf 3 - Inside of config file We gonna add this code order += "cpu_temperature 0" cpu_temperature 0 { format = "%degrees °C 🌡️" path = "/sys/devices/pl...
